description: Cloudflare SSL/TLS settings — Full (Strict) mode with HSTS

ssl.comment: Origin has valid ACM certificate on ALB; Cloudflare verifies it

setup_instructions: Apply via Cloudflare dashboard: SSL/TLS > Overview (Full Strict), Edge Certificates (min TLS 1.2, HSTS). Or via API: PATCH /zones/{zone_id}/settings/ssl, PATCH /zones/{zone_id}/settings/min_tls_version
